evals.prompt: Analyze my app and tell me what's wrong. It looks cheap and changes don't seem to work.
evals.expected_output: Structured report identifying uncommitted git changes as the reason changes aren't persisting, plus design and backend findings with severity levels and file paths.

evals.prompt: Is this app secure enough to launch publicly? What needs fixing before real users start using it?
evals.expected_output: Security-focused report highlighting CORS wildcard, unauthenticated admin endpoints, unverified webhook signatures, and email header spoofing, with specific fixes.

evals.prompt: Something feels off about the design even though we have nice fonts and animations. Can you figure out what it is?
evals.expected_output: Design-focused analysis identifying specific spacing inconsistencies, visual hierarchy issues, or UX gaps with file paths and line numbers from the frontend.
